item.title: 交易员不再完全预期美联储今年降息
item.description: 债券交易员不再完全预期美联储将在2026年降息。【原文：Bond traders ceased to fully price in that the Federal Reserve will lower interest rates in 2026.】

item.title: 鲍曼称美联储将于下周公布银行资本计划
item.description: 美联储首席银行监管官员周四表示，美国贷款机构将在未来一周收到监管机构提出的新资本方案。【原文：US lenders are poised to see new capital proposals from regulators in the coming week, the Federal Reserve’s top bank cop said Thursday.】

item.title: 帕兰蒂尔在与五角大楼争执后寻求拓展安普瑞克之外的业务
item.description: 在Anthropic PBC与五角大楼的争端中，Palantir Technologies Inc.可能转向其他人工智能模型。【原文：Palantir Technologies Inc. may turn to other AI models amid the spat between Anthropic PBC and the Pentagon.】

item.title: 英国称伊朗可能在霍尔木兹海峡开采矿产，哈梅内伊正收紧对海峡的控制
item.description: 英国称，伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的迹象日益明显。伊朗新任最高领袖首次接受媒体采访时表示，这条关键水道应当保持关闭状态。【原文：It’s becoming increasingly evident that Iran is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, according to the UK, as Iran’s new supreme leader used his first comments to the media to say the critical waterway should stay closed.】

item.title: Rivian更实惠车型即将亮相，定价57,990美元
item.description: 电动汽车消费者至少要等到2027年，Rivian汽车公司才会推出售价低于5万美元的SUV车型。【原文：Electric-vehicle shoppers will have to wait until at least 2027 for Rivian Automotive Inc. to sell an SUV for less than $50,000.】

item.title: 纽约市长曼达尼直面城市财政问题的警告
item.description: 纽约市长佐兰·曼达尼本周接连收到关于城市财政状况的警告，他正试图兑现雄心勃勃的竞选承诺，同时又面临严峻的财政现实。【原文：New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani was hit with a string of warnings this week about the city’s finances, as he tries to enact ambitious campaign promises while contending with a gloomy fiscal reality.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利资产管理公司股价下跌，因赎回上限限制
item.description: 周四，摩根士丹利股价领跌美国主要银行，与顶级资产管理公司股票同步下跌，此前该银行限制了其某项私人信贷基金的赎回。【原文：Shares of Morgan Stanley led losses among major US banks on Thursday, falling in tandem with stocks of top asset managers, after the lender limited withdrawals from one of its private credit funds.】

item.title: 埃尼诺尔认为提升天然气产量以缓解战争影响的空间有限
item.description: 挪威国家石油公司（Equinor ASA）提升挪威天然气产量的能力有限，难以弥补因伊朗战争导致的液化天然气供应中断造成的缺口。【原文：Equinor ASA has limited capacity to boost Norwegian natural gas output to make up for the disruptions to liquefied natural gas supply from the Iran war.】

item.title: 刚果州黄金公司启动全国首座黄金精炼厂
item.description: 刚果民主共和国启动了首家国家支持的金精炼厂，旨在规范该国矿产资源丰富的东部地区历史上与走私和冲突密切相关的黄金贸易。【原文：Democratic Republic of Congo launched its first state-backed gold refinery as it moves to formalize a trade historically linked to smuggling and conflict in the country’s mineral-rich east.】

item.title: 美国将放宽航运规则以遏制油价飙升
item.description: 据知情人士透露，特朗普政府计划豁免一项存在百年的海事法规，该法规要求美国港口间货物运输必须使用美国船只。此举旨在抑制飙升的石油和汽油价格。【原文：The Trump administration plans to waive a century-old maritime law that requires American ships be used to transport goods between US ports as it seeks to blunt surging oil and gasoline prices, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 石油资源丰富的安哥拉将基准利率维持在17.5%，伊朗战火正酣
item.description: 安哥拉央行将基准利率维持在17.5%，这是自8月以来首次暂停加息，此前因美以对伊朗开战导致油价飙升。【原文：Angola’s central bank kept its benchmark interest rate at 17.5%, pausing for the first time since August after oil prices surged because of the US-Israel war on Iran.】

item.title: 美国在与伊朗开战首周花费113亿美元
item.description: 一位知情人士透露，美国官员向国会议员表示，与伊朗开战的前六天耗资超过113亿美元，这是迄今对特朗普总统军事行动所涉费用的最详细评估。【原文：US officials told lawmakers that the first six days of the war with Iran cost more than $11.3 billion, a person familiar with the matter said, giving the most detailed assessment yet of the expense involved in President Donald Trump’s military campaign.】

item.title: 交易所首席执行官呼吁重新审视预测市场的便捷上市机制
item.description: 芝加哥最大交易所的负责人呼吁重新审视相关流程，该流程允许预测市场平台在未获得明确监管批准的情况下通过挂牌金融合约实现快速扩张。【原文：The heads of Chicago’s largest exchanges are calling for a review of the process that has allowed prediction market platforms to grow quickly by listing financial contracts without explicit regulatory approval.】

item.title: 法国互助银行首席经济学家巴尔称通胀是战争引发的主要银行风险
item.description: 法国互助银行董事长丹尼尔·巴尔表示，伊朗战争对欧洲银行最大的风险在于价格的快速上涨。【原文：Crédit Mutuel Chairman Daniel Baal said a rapid acceleration in price is the biggest risk for European banks from the Iran war.】

item.title: 塞内加尔支付4.71亿美元用于偿还外债
item.description: 知情人士称，塞内加尔已提前在本周五截止期限前支付了其外债的利息和本金，避免了潜在的违约风险。该国目前正寻求国际货币基金组织的援助。【原文：Senegal has paid coupons and principal on its foreign bonds ahead of this Friday’s deadline, avoiding a potential default as the nation seeks aid from the International Monetary Fund, people familiar with the situation said.】

item.title: 莱昂·库珀曼警告称市场估值过高且面临地缘政治风险
item.description: 前对冲基金经理、现经营家族办公室的莱昂·库珀曼表示，金融市场估值过高，因为相对于企业利润而言，股票价格已变得过于昂贵。【原文：Leon Cooperman, the former hedge fund manager who now runs his own family office, said financial markets are overpriced as stocks have become too costly relative to company profits.】

item.title: 东方海外盈利下滑后警示中东风险
item.description: 东方海外国际有限公司警告称，中东地区不断升级的冲突给行业带来更多不确定性，此前一系列地缘政治问题已侵蚀了去年的收益。【原文：Orient Overseas International Ltd. warned that the escalating conflict in the Middle East poses further uncertainty to the industry, after an array of geopolitical woes eroded last year’s earnings.】

item.title: 欧盟考虑放宽碳排放规则并提供国家援助以降低能源价格
item.description: 据知情人士透露，欧盟委员会正考虑放宽碳排放配额供应规则，并允许更多国家援助，作为紧急计划的一部分，以遏制飙升的电力价格。【原文：The European Commission is considering relaxing carbon-permit supply rules and allowing more state aid as part of an emergency plan to cut spiking power prices, according to people familiar with the plans.】

item.title: 美国天然气价格波动，交易商权衡中东冲突与库存状况
item.description: 美国天然气期货价格在小幅涨跌之间震荡，交易员们权衡着对中东供应持续中断的担忧，以及政府报告将显示当周天然气库存降幅低于正常水平的预期。【原文：US natural gas futures swung between slight gains and losses as traders weighed fears of a continued disruption to Middle East supplies against expectations that a government report would show a smaller-than-normal weekly withdrawal from storage.】

item.title: 神威芯片乘中国人工智能浪潮实现首次年度盈利
item.description: 康柏康科技公司报告了其成立以来的首个年度盈利，此前北京方面在英伟达公司受到限制的情况下，鼓励中国领先的人工智能开发商采用国产芯片。【原文：Cambricon Technologies Corp. reported its first-ever annual profit after Beijing encouraged China’s leading artificial intelligence developers to adopt locally made chips given restrictions on Nvidia Corp.】

item.title: 国际货币基金组织敦促南非制定成功的财政规则
item.description: 国际货币基金组织表示，南非通过所谓财政规则控制公共财政的计划将有助于恢复政策公信力，但该计划要取得成功仍需获得强力支持。【原文：South Africa’s plan to control public finances via a so-called fiscal rule will help restore policy credibility but it will need significant support to succeed, according to the International Monetary Fund.】

item.title: 埃普斯坦多年来围绕彼得·蒂尔打转，为的是金钱、人脉和建议
item.description: 全球媒体曝出杰弗里·爱泼斯坦强迫一名少女与安德鲁王子发生性关系数周后，这位金融家联系科技企业家彼得·蒂尔称，他已在纽约为蒂尔安排了两名财政部长和"一群银行家"会面。"我的负面新闻是否让你犹豫了？"爱泼斯坦在2015年的信息中补充道。【原文：A few weeks after allegations surfaced in the global media that Jeffrey Epstein forced a teenager to have sexual relations with Prince Andrew, the financier contacted tech entrepreneur Peter Thiel to say he had two finance ministers and “a bunch of bankers” for him to meet in New York.“does my bad press give you pause.” Epstein added in the 2015 message.】

item.title: 家用洗碗机器人制造商Sunday估值达11.5亿美元
item.description: 周日公司已筹集1.65亿美元资金，旨在打造一款适合所有家庭的理想机器人：这台外形友好的机器能够完成清理餐桌、洗涤衣物和装载洗碗机等家务任务。【原文：Sunday Inc. has raised $165 million to build a dream robot for any household: a friendly looking machine capable of performing tasks like clearing a dinner table, doing laundry and loading a dishwasher.】

item.title: 微软加入健康助手行列，为Copilot聊天机器人提供支持
item.description: 微软公司正为其Copilot聊天机器人添加专属健康助手功能，加入科技企业行列，押注消费者将转向人工智能工具获取医疗服务。【原文：Microsoft Corp. is adding a dedicated health assistant to its Copilot chatbot, joining the ranks of technology companies betting that customers will turn to artificial intelligence tools for medical care.】

item.title: 嘉信理财首席执行官称精通市场的Z世代加入逢低买入狂潮
item.description: 查尔斯·施瓦布公司首席执行官里克·沃斯特表示，新一代投资者在每次回调时都持续涌入购买美国股票。【原文：It’s a new generation of investors that keep showing up to buy US equities at every pullback, according to Rick Wurster, chief executive officer of Charles Schwab Corp.】

item.title: Voya因担忧人工智能需求而限制数据中心信贷投资
item.description: 据Voya金融公司旗下投资部门称，科技企业已借贷数十亿美元用于推动人工智能数据中心的快速扩张，但该需求可能在债务全部偿还前就面临增长放缓的风险。【原文：Technology companies have borrowed billions to fuel the rapid expansion of data centers for AI, but that demand is at risk of reaching a plateau before the debts are all paid back, according to Voya Financial Inc.’s investment arm.】

item.title: 氛围编码初创公司Lovable达成4亿美元经常性收入
item.description: 瑞典初创公司Lovable的年度经常性收入已突破4亿美元，随着企业和用户纷纷涌向能让初学者轻松编程的人工智能工具，该公司业务持续增长。【原文：Swedish startup Lovable has hit $400 million in annual recurring revenue, as companies and users flock to artificial intelligence tools that make it easy for beginners to code.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的石油冲击创纪录，考验危机应对工具
item.description: 交易商、银行和顾问们对紧急储备的释放能否及时填补巨大的供应缺口表示怀疑。【原文：Traders, banks and consultants are doubtful the release of emergency stockpiles can be swift enough to plug the yawning supply gap.】

item.title: 美国住房开工量因多户住宅项目意外攀升
item.description: 美国新住宅开工量连续第三个月增长，达到近一年来最快增速，多户住宅项目是主要推动力。【原文：New US residential construction improved for a third straight month to the fastest pace in nearly a year, boosted by multifamily projects.】

item.title: 美国1月贸易赤字收窄幅度超预期
item.description: 美国1月份贸易赤字有所收窄，出口实现增长，此前国内进口商经历了动荡的一年，不得不应对反复无常的关税政策。【原文：The US trade deficit narrowed in January as exports increased, coming off of a turbulent year for domestic importers contending with erratic tariff policy.】
